Name: Strike
Effect: Deals Base Damage to the Enemy

Name: Frenzy
Effect: Deals Base Damage × number of ATK tokens already on the line

Name: Guard
Effect: Absorbs Base Defense from incoming damage

Name: Rampart
Effect: Absorbs Base Defense × 2 only if it's the last token executed

Name: Heal
Effect: Restores 8 HP to the player when executed

Name: Echo
Effect: Duplicates the effect of the token immediately to its left

Name: Purge
Effect: Immediately removes the leftmost Hazard from the line

Name: Backstab
Effect: Base Damage ×3 if drawn 1st ; No token after → Base Damage ×5

Name: Catalyst
Effect: Doubles next token drawn ; 1st → doubles next 2 tokens

Name: Fortify
Effect: Each DEF token on line gains +1 Base Defense this turn

Name: Reckless
Effect: Each ATTACK token on line gains +1 Base Damage this turn

Name: Resonance
Effect: Base Damage × nb of different token types on line. No effect if any duplicate
